events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes wire pulling work at rough-complete stage, but the submitted package lacks the quantity takeoff needed to score the checkpoint. Photos show several completed pieces but area count and remaining scope are not listed. Without the quantity takeoff, I cannot accurately assess percent complete or verify compliance with NEC 200.6 (grounded conductor identification) and 210.5 (branch circuit identification).

Since the package is missing critical information needed to assess the work, the decision should be "needs_more_info." Risk is medium because we can't verify compliance. No specific defects are identified in the photos described. Work stage is rough-complete as given.
